about.title: About
about.metaDescription: OFAG — Technical Printing Solutions for Regulated Industries. Over 57 years in the printing market, dedicated to the pharmaceutical industry.
about.heading: Technical Printing Solutions for Regulated Industries
about.intro: Osvaldo, Fernandes S.A. Artes Gráficas (OFAG) has been in the printing market for over 57 years and has been dedicated exclusively to the pharmaceutical industry for over 40 years.
about.presence: Our products are present in more than 80 countries.
about.differentiation: Structure ready to meet the needs of regulated markets, with a focus on technical authority, industrial reliability and compliance.
about.introExtended: Nice to meet you, we are OFAG. We carry out our work every day to help print a better future for the planet and for people. Our leaflets are sustainable products and our suppliers share the same commitment to the future of the planet.
about.whoWeAre: We are a national company with more than 60 years of history that has learned, since its foundation, the value of work, unity and persistence. With a forward-looking vision, we value maintaining the planet’s sustainability as a way of contributing to new generations.
about.whatWeDo: We are among the three largest converters in Latin America. Our production lines deliver printed products in more than 85 different languages. We use technology so that users of our products receive reliable information that reflects the artwork provided by our customers.
about.history: The initiative to innovate and the courage to invest in Brazil have been part of OFAG since its foundation. Our sixty-year history is marked by great care in everything we set out to do.

services.title: Services
services.metaDescription: Leaflets and labels for pharmaceutical, veterinary, phytosanitary and agro segments. Technical printing, segregated production area and electronic inspection. OFAG.
services.heroLine: Leaflets and labels for the pharmaceutical, veterinary, phytosanitary and agro segments.
services.heading: Our services and products
services.subtitle: Quality for OFAG means fully meeting the commitments made with its clients, manufacturing and improving its products — Labels and Leaflets — always within balanced, harmonious and safe processes.
services.introValues: To respect and value all employees and partners, making them aware that we work for companies that invest in research and care for human health and life — in short, for each of us.

leaflets.title: Leaflets
leaflets.desc: Leaflets in compliance with regulatory and readability requirements.

labels.title: Labels and structures
labels.desc: Solutions in labels and adhesives for primary and secondary packaging.

qualityRef.title: Quality reference
qualityRef.p1: OFAG’s quality reference is its portfolio of multinational clients and leading Brazilian laboratories (see our clients), which periodically conduct audits at our facilities to support our processes and products.
qualityRef.p2: OFAG guarantees the supply of its products through certification, based on analysis results and sampling predefined with each client’s technical team. All of this is supported by Good Manufacturing Practices (G.M.P.) and ISO 9000 / FSC Certification.

clients.reviewsSubtitle: What our clients say about partnering with OFAG.

reviews.comment: Long-standing partnership with excellence in quality and on-time delivery. OFAG is a benchmark in technical printing for our segment.
Professionalism and traceability in every delivery. We recommend them for projects requiring regulatory compliance.
Responsive service and dedicated technical support. The OFAG team understands the needs of the pharmaceutical market.

quality.title: Quality & Processes
quality.metaDescription: Learn about OFAG’s quality structure, sustainable supply chain and production flows.
quality.heroTitle: Quality, processes and sustainability in technical printing.
quality.heroSubtitle: From renewable forests to the finished product, every step is designed to guarantee safety, traceability and respect for the planet.

orgChart.title: OFAG organizational chart
orgChart.summary: An industrial structure with management, quality, finance, commercial and operations working together to serve regulated markets.

qualityOrgChart.title: Quality organization
qualityOrgChart.summary: A dedicated Quality Assurance and Quality Control team, with specific leadership and shift-based teams responsible for registration, inspections and product release.

supplyChain.title: Our supply chain
supplyChain.intro: OFAG’s supply chain connects renewable sources and specialized inputs to the pharmaceutical industry, ensuring traceability at every stage.
steps: Renewable forests provide eucalyptus chips that are transformed into cellulose.
Cellulose and FSC paper suppliers convert the raw material into certified paper reels.
Vegetable oils, pigments, resins and additives are combined to form the offset inks used in printing.
Inputs arrive at OFAG, where they are converted into technical leaflets for the pharmaceutical industry.
Leaflets are delivered to laboratories and regulated industries, closing the cycle with a focus on sustainability.

newProductFlow.title: New product flow
steps: The customer presents the need and initial artwork for the product.
The artwork and specification team analyses the technical requirements.
The order is received, distributed and registered with the product data.
The technical team evaluates feasibility, process and best-suited materials.
The product is registered and released for production within the industrial flow.

offsetFlow.title: Offset process flowchart
steps: Prepress: preparation of printing plates and files.
Printing: application of inks to paper with registration and colour control.
Cutting: printed sheets are cut according to the defined format.
Review: 100% of the leaflets are checked for printing failures.
Folding and finishing: folding, gluing and packing the leaflets for shipment.

inspections.title: Inspections during manufacturing
inspections.summary: Throughout the production process, different control points ensure that each leaflet meets technical and regulatory specifications.
items: Inspection of the printing plate and press set-up.
Verification of grammage, thickness and fidelity to the approved content.
Control of colour and overall appearance of the printed leaflet.
Checking the dimensions (height and width) of cut pieces.
Checking number of folds, folding sequence and number of leaflets per bundle and per box.
Correct identification of packaging before shipment.

cleaningRelease.title: Cleaning and release of area
cleaningRelease.summary: Every new job order begins with ensuring that the production area is clean, organized and released for use.
steps: Initial cleaning of the area by the responsible operator.
Inspection and release by the quality team.
Record of the release and preparation for the next job order.

sustainableProducts.title: Sustainable products
sustainableProducts.summary: All paper discarded by OFAG is sent for recycling through specialized partners, reinforcing our commitment to circular economy and waste reduction.

equipment.title: Equipment and infrastructure
equipment.summary: Printing park with offset and flexographic presses, dedicated cutting and folding lines and areas separated by warehouse, ensuring an organized flow between prepress, production and shipping.
